search_metadata.query: latest technology news March 13 2026 AI chips software

news_items.title: How to watch Jensen Huang's Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote
news_items.snippet: Nvidia is rumored to be releasing a new AI inference chip and an open source platform for enterprise AI agents called NemoClaw. The chip aims to accelerate AI inference processes and help Nvidia dominate both training and inference markets.
news_items.importance: High - Major AI hardware and software announcements from Nvidia

news_items.title: Atlassian follows Block's footsteps and cuts staff in the name of AI
news_items.snippet: Atlassian announced it's cutting 10% of its workforce (around 1,600 people) to redirect funds toward AI development and enterprise sales, following similar moves by other tech companies.
news_items.importance: Medium - Significant workforce restructuring driven by AI investment priorities

news_items.title: Meta acquired Moltbook, the AI agent social network
news_items.snippet: Meta acquired Moltbook, an AI agent social network that went viral due to fake posts generated by AI agents, expanding Meta's presence in AI-driven social platforms.
news_items.importance: Medium - Strategic acquisition in AI social networking space

news_items.title: Google rolls out new Gemini capabilities to Docs, Sheets, Slides, and Drive
news_items.snippet: Google is expanding Gemini's AI capabilities across its productivity suite, integrating advanced AI features into Docs, Sheets, Slides, and Drive to enhance workplace productivity.
news_items.importance: High - Major AI integration across widely used productivity tools

news_items.title: Sales automation startup Rox AI hits $1.2B valuation
news_items.snippet: Rox AI, an intelligent revenue operating system that deploys hundreds of AI agents to monitor accounts and research prospects, has reached a $1.2 billion valuation.
news_items.importance: Medium - Significant funding milestone for AI sales automation

news_items.title: Webflow buys AI content-generation platform Vidoso
news_items.snippet: Webflow acquired Vidoso, an AI-powered content generation platform that helps organizations create marketing collateral like images, presentations, videos, and social media content.
news_items.importance: Medium - AI content generation acquisition for marketing automation

news_items.title: Yann LeCun's AMI Labs raises $1.03B to build world models
news_items.snippet: Yann LeCun's AMI Labs secured $1.03 billion in funding to develop world models for AI systems, representing one of the largest AI research funding rounds.
news_items.importance: High - Major funding for advanced AI research by renowned AI researcher

news_items.title: Anthropic launches code review tool to check AI-generated code
news_items.snippet: Anthropic has launched a new code review tool designed to check the quality and safety of AI-generated code, addressing growing concerns about code quality in AI-assisted development.
news_items.importance: Medium - Important tool for AI code quality and safety

news_items.title: Gumloop lands $50M from Benchmark for AI agent building platform
news_items.snippet: Gumloop raised $50 million from Benchmark to develop a platform that enables employees to build AI agents, democratizing AI agent creation across organizations.
news_items.importance: Medium - Significant funding for AI agent development platform

news_items.title: Group14 opens factory for battery materials for flash-charging EVs
news_items.snippet: Group14 Technologies opened a new factory to produce advanced battery materials for electric vehicles capable of flash charging, representing a breakthrough in EV battery technology.
news_items.importance: Medium - Important development in EV battery technology

news_items.title: Bumble introduces AI dating assistant 'Bee'
news_items.snippet: Bumble launched 'Bee', an AI dating assistant designed to help users with dating advice and conversation starters, representing the growing integration of AI in social apps.
news_items.importance: Low - AI feature addition to consumer dating app

news_items.title: Alexa+ gets new 'adults only' personality option
news_items.snippet: Amazon's Alexa+ introduced a new 'adults only' personality option that uses more casual language including cursing, but maintains boundaries against NSFW content.
news_items.importance: Low - Feature update to voice assistant personality options

news_items.title: Truecaller adds scam call blocking for family members
news_items.snippet: Truecaller introduced a feature allowing users to hang up on scam calls on behalf of family members, expanding its scam protection capabilities.
news_items.importance: Low - Security feature enhancement for communication app

main_trends: Tech company restructuring for AI investment
Integration of AI into consumer and enterprise products
